title: The Gate of Justice Looms
description: Franky resists CP9 and the government agents while the rescue effort nears the judicial island.
scene: Across pages 17, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji, Chopper. Franky resists CP9 and the government agents while the rescue effort nears the judicial island.
summary: Franky resists CP9 and the government agents while the rescue effort nears the judicial island.
